source_label: GitHub — typst/typst README ("IPA: /taɪpst/. 'Ty' like in Typesetting and 'pst' like in Hipster.")
notes: Typst is a Rust-based markup typesetting system pitched as a modern LaTeX replacement, driven from the command line with typst compile. Its official README settles the pronunciation with IPA /taɪpst/: one single syllable, "Ty" as in Typesetting plus "pst" as in Hipster. It is NOT "typist" — there is no vowel between the p and the st.
